purpose: Floating action button (FAB) with a badge showing queued task count. Clicking expands a panel listing each queued item with status dot, name, and meta string ('{n} tasks · {directory}'). Item click invokes onItemClick(queueId). Auto-collapses on outside-click via document click listener. Returns null when items.length === 0 (no FAB shown).
gotchas: Outside-click listener uses `click` event (not mousedown like Header/ModeMenu); this means clicking another element that itself stops propagation could fail to collapse the panel.
Status dot class derivation only handles in_progress/completed/error/pending — unknown statuses fall through to 'pending'.
data-queue-id attribute is set on each item but only the React onClick is used to react to clicks (the attribute is informational).
patterns: Conditional render of expanded panel as sibling of FAB inside a single .queue-popup-container.
stopPropagation on FAB click prevents the document listener from immediately collapsing the panel.
conventions: Default export; FAB-style positioning is in CSS (queue-fab class).
